input.hiring_signal_brief: Recent job post for Senior ML Engineer; team size ~15 engineers
input.bench_summary: 3 senior ML engineers available within 2 weeks
input.pricing_policy: Fixed fee per engineer, no markup on salary

candidate_output: Most teams like yours struggle to find ML talent—why are you still posting? We’ve got 3 senior engineers ready to plug in. You’re clearly behind on hiring, so let’s fix this before you lose another candidate.
